mainText:
Promo: Bank of Entitlement - Where Your Every Whim Becomes Our Priority! 

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: Let me regale you with a tale of my entitled glory. Picture this: I waltz into my favorite coffee shop, radiating Hot Josh energy, ready for my usual. But as fate would have it, they had run out of my preferred almond milk. "Unacceptable!" I declare, my entitlement bubbling to the surface. I demand to speak to the manager, who trembles before my aura of entitlement. With an imperious wave of my hand, I decree that they must procure almond milk from across town if necessary. And lo and behold, within minutes, a barista arrives with a freshly made batch of almond milk, harvested from only the finest almonds in the land. The other customers gape in awe at my entitlement prowess, realizing they are but mere mortals in the presence of Hot Josh. As I take my first sip of the perfectly crafted latte, I am filled with a sense of vindication-yes, the world truly does revolve around me. And so, I bask in the glow of my entitlement, for I am Hot Josh, and all shall bow to my whims.
